name: radon-web
description: Radon Terminal — market structure reconstruction instrument with real-time IB streaming and AI chat.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n next,ib,api -c cyan,yellow,green "next dev" "node ../scripts/ib_realtime_server.js" "python3.13 -m uvicorn scripts.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8321 --reload --app-dir .."
scripts.dev:verbose: concurrently -n next,ib,api -c cyan,yellow,green "NEXT_DEBUG_LOGGING=1 next dev" "node ../scripts/ib_realtime_server.js --verbose" "python3.13 -m uvicorn scripts.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8321 --reload --app-dir .."
scripts.dev:verbose:next: concurrently -n next,ib,api -c cyan,yellow,green "NEXT_DEBUG_LOGGING=1 next dev" "node ../scripts/ib_realtime_server.js" "python3.13 -m uvicorn scripts.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8321 --reload --app-dir .."
scripts.dev:verbose:ib: concurrently -n next,ib,api -c cyan,yellow,green "next dev" "node ../scripts/ib_realtime_server.js --verbose" "python3.13 -m uvicorn scripts.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8321 --reload --app-dir .."
